messages.content: # Want to know how Custom Servers work? Read through this Guide!

> Custom servers are YOUR way to create No Hesi servers just for YOU! 
> YOU are able to choose what cars are available to use from the entire [No Hesi Content Delivery Network](https://cdn.nohesi.gg/)
> YOU can also pick any map from the [No Hesi Content Delivery Network](https://cdn.nohesi.gg/)
> YOUR server can be SHARED with YOUR FRIENDS so you may all play together privately!
> YOU can choose the Traffic, Weather and Time of day! 

> **These servers have restrictions based on your no hesi access level (Public, Tier 1-2-3).**

**Below is a breakdown of how the restrictions work**.

## __**Public/Free**__

> Public players have access to any **Non Tier** cars and maps from https://cdn.nohesi.gg/

> Public has a **90 minute limit on playtime** using custom servers in a 24 hour span. 

> Public *cannot save* server presets. A new server will have to be made each time. 

## __**Tier 1**__

> Tier 1 players have access to any **Tier 1 and Public** content offered on https://cdn.nohesi.gg/

> Tier 1 users have a **4 hour limit on playtime** using custom servers in a 24 hour period. 

> Tier 1 users *can save* ONE server preset. 

## __**Tier 2**__

> Tier 2 users have access to any **Tier 2, Tier 1 and Public** content offered on https://cdn.nohesi.gg/ 

> Tier 2 users have a **6 hour limit on playtime** using custom servers in a 24 hour period. 

> Tier 2 users *can save* FIVE server presets. 

## __**Tier 3**__

> Tier 3 users have access to **all content** on https://cdn.nohesi.gg/. 

> Tier 3 users have **unlimited playtime** on custom servers. 

> Tier 3 can save *can save* TEN server presets. 

### Head over to https://nohesi.gg/custom-servers and get started creating your own No Hesi servers or check out <#1431129228618895401>
